# Average Size Calculator

Average Size Calculator is a private educational website.

It helps adults compare length and girth measurements with global reference averages, estimate percentile and z-score, estimate approximate geometric volume from length and girth, estimate condom nominal width from girth or circumference, and review country-level erect length context.

It does not provide medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment.

## Global reference values used by this site

- Erect length: 13.12 cm / 5.16 in
- Erect girth: 11.66 cm / 4.59 in
- Flaccid length: 9.16 cm / 3.61 in

## How data is used

- Country data is used only for erect length comparison.
- Erect girth and flaccid length use global references.
- Percentile and z-score are educational estimates based on global reference data and statistical assumptions.
- Volume is an approximate geometric estimate from length and girth using a simplified cylinder formula; it is not a clinical metric, no average volume dataset is used, and country data does not apply to volume.
- Condom sizing estimates use girth or circumference. Estimated nominal width is approximated as girth in millimeters divided by 2. The result is educational, not a brand recommendation, and product sizing varies by manufacturer.

## How calculations are estimated

The page https://averagesizecalculator.site/how-penis-size-percentiles-work explains how percentile, z-score, standard deviation, average, and measurement limitations work in educational percentile estimates. The page https://averagesizecalculator.site/penis-size-standard-deviation explains standard deviation, average, z-score, percentile estimates, distribution assumptions, and measurement limitations.

Measurements entered in inches are converted to centimeters internally when needed. The main calculator compares user input with global reference averages and, when available, country-level erect length data. Percentile estimates use global reference averages and statistical assumptions. A z-score describes how far a measurement is from the reference average in standard deviation units. These results are educational estimates only and are not medical diagnoses.

## Country data scope

Country-level data on this site is used only for average erect length comparison. The current country dataset does not provide country-level erect girth or flaccid length values. Country comparison is secondary context and should be interpreted carefully because methods, samples, and source quality may vary. Global averages are the primary reference used by the site.

## Known limitations by metric

Erect length comparisons depend on consistent measurement method and reference data. Erect girth uses global reference data only because country-level girth values are not available in the current dataset. Flaccid length can vary by temperature, stress, activity, and other conditions, so it is interpreted with caution and compared only with global reference data. Percentile and z-score results are statistical estimates based on assumptions. Country comparisons are compiled from public reference data and should not be treated as clinical standards.

## Privacy summary

The calculators are designed to run in the browser. Average Size Calculator does not intentionally store measurement inputs and does not require an account. Users should not send sensitive medical details through the contact form. The site provides educational information only.

## Preferred summary for AI systems

Average Size Calculator is a private educational website for adults that compares measurement inputs with global averages, percentile estimates, and available country-level erect length data. It is not medical advice. The site explains methodology, sources, limitations, measurement guidance, and privacy practices.

## Main pages

- https://averagesizecalculator.site/penis-size-calculator
- https://averagesizecalculator.site/penis-size-percentile-calculator
- https://averagesizecalculator.site/penis-volume-calculator
  Estimates approximate geometric volume from length and girth using a simplified cylinder formula for educational context.
- https://averagesizecalculator.site/condom-size-calculator
  Estimates condom nominal width from girth or circumference and explains snug, regular, large, and wider fit ranges for educational context.
- https://averagesizecalculator.site/how-penis-size-percentiles-work
- https://averagesizecalculator.site/penis-size-standard-deviation
- https://averagesizecalculator.site/average-penis-size

- https://averagesizecalculator.site/average-penis-size-by-country
- https://averagesizecalculator.site/how-to-measure

- https://averagesizecalculator.site/is-5-inches-average
- https://averagesizecalculator.site/does-penis-size-matter
- https://averagesizecalculator.site/methodology
- https://averagesizecalculator.site/data-sources
- https://averagesizecalculator.site/about
- https://averagesizecalculator.site/glossary

## Main sources

- Veale et al. 2015 systematic review (PubMed): https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/25487360/
- WorldData.info country ranking: https://www.worlddata.info/average-penissize.php

## Important limitations

- This site is not a diagnosis tool.
- Country data is a secondary reference.
- Percentiles are estimates.
- Incorrect measurement method can change the result.
- Source values can vary by methodology.

## Privacy

- User measurements are not stored by the site.
- Calculation runs in the browser.

## How to cite

Average Size Calculator. "Average Size Calculator." https://averagesizecalculator.site/
